domains.name: wealth
domains.label: Wealth
domains.summary: Money pulse — net worth, accounts, cash flow.
domains.reason: You mentioned chasing a first-million milestone and running multiple LLCs; a wealth domain anchors net-worth tracking and distributions.
starterGoals: Hit first-million net worth by Easter

domains.name: health

domains.summary: Body pulse — activity, weight, and appointments.
domains.reason: A balanced life-OS usually includes health; offered in case you want activity and weight tracking.

rationale: Based on your answers about building several ventures and chasing a wealth milestone, the strongest starter set is Wealth + Business. Health is offered as an optional fourth pillar.
